falsifier: A stale-parent branch is lost, both branches enter default context, the canonical head is overwritten by stale lineage, or Gamma merges without citing both branch hashes.
threat_model_scope: Local single-workspace stale-parent race methodology only; not distributed consensus, semantic truth, hidden provider identity, or production multi-node locking.
public_note: Bounded methodology lane showing that concurrent agent work can be preserved as deterministic evidence with one canonical head and quarantined non-canonical branches.
claim_boundary: This supports a local methodology claim about preserving concurrent stale-parent races as evidence. It does not prove distributed multi-writer correctness or universal agent orchestration guarantees.
